name: Clingons
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine 4 cups marshmallows, peanut butter, and oleo. Microwave on high for 2 minutes or until melted; stir until smooth.
3. Add the remaining marshmallows, Rice Chex, M & M's, and Corn Chex in that order; stir to coat all pieces evenly.
4. Using the back of a buttered spoon or buttered hands, spread the cereal mixture evenly into the prepared pan.
5. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. To serve, pull apart and enjoy. Refrigerate any leftovers in an airtight container.
